text: 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 1 = Supervision - Oversight, encouragement or cueing provided 3 or more times during last 7 days -OR- Supervision (3 or more times) plus physical assistance provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 2 = Limited Assistance - Resident highly involved in activity, received physical help in guided maneuvering of limbs or other nonweight bearing assistance 3 or more times -OR- More help provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 3 = Extensive Assistance -
